planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 tests achieved-pose rewards inside the one-step WBC selector while preserving support/ZMP/slip costs.

perspectives.product: directly targets the remaining knee-flexion visible-gate gap
perspectives.architecture: patches selector scoring rather than raw knee target offsets
perspectives.qa: native raw JSON per candidate plus visible 8cm, knee/hip, support, slip, return gates
perspectives.skeptic: pose reward may choose candidates that look good one step ahead but collapse later

dod: run pose-aware selector candidates around exp74 best timing
report whether achieved-pose scoring closes knee gap without losing recovery

sources.note: Task-based WBC combines feet pose, CoM/ZMP regulation, and joint objective handling.
Humanoid squat control is framed as trajectory optimization plus WBC tracking.
ZMP inside the support polygon is used as a dynamic balance condition in humanoid WBC.
Recent humanoid G1 work uses knee-flexion terms for squatting-to-height behavior, motivating achieved-pose scoring instead of raw offsets.
